updateNotes:
• Initial release RiTune 1.0
• Baseline built from telegram working debug APK
• Fix YouTube song playback (ANDROID_MUSIC main client)
• In-app custom GitHub update system enabled
• Fast song loading (<0.5s start)
• English locale default
• AOD single tap return to player
• Fullscreen uncropped music background image
• Uncropped high-definition turntable icon
